series_metadata.series_title: BSI - SL Corporate Applications; Orders; and Requests for Regulatory Approval
series_metadata.series_description: These files contain information related to corporate applications, orders, and requests for regulatory approval with the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions and related agreements, exhibits and correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm for five (5) years after dissolution of an institution, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic copy for five (5) years after dissolution of an institution, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
